name: Norwegian Riskrim
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Heavy Cream, whipped and sweetened to taste
recipeInstructions:
Riskrim is the Norwegian Christmas dessert. It is so delicious that it is worth waiting a year for.
Cook rice and salt in milk using a double boiler until the rice is soft and the mixture thick, approximately 1.5 hours. Add sugar and almond extract. Chill. Stir in chopped almonds and one whole almond. Mix in whipped cream. Serve with red fruit sauce (raspberry, strawberry, or lingonberry).
